title: NFT Gallery Viewer
body: Drop-in React component that renders a full NFT gallery for any wallet using GoldRush Kit's NFTWalletCollectionView â€” zero custom UI needed.

title: NFT Metadata Fetcher
body: Retrieve full NFT metadata, traits, and ownership history for any token onchain.

title: NFT Portfolio Valuation
body: Value an entire NFT portfolio using live collection and market data.

title: NFT Token Sale History
body: Full transfer and sale history for a single NFT token ID â€” who owned it, when it sold, and for how much. Powers provenance viewers and NFT detail pages.

title: NFT Traits Explorer
body: Fetch all trait types and their value distributions for an NFT collection. Essential for rarity calculators, collection analytics, and trait-based filtering UIs.

title: NFT Transfer Tracker
body: Monitor NFT mints, transfers, and burns as they happen onchain.

title: Ronin NFT Inventory
body: List all NFTs held in a Ronin wallet — Axie Infinity, Land, and other Sky Mavis NFT collections.
